falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom held above 5,100; a break below 4,800 would indicate a much deeper structural breakdown than the referenced pattern, proving the analog failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 41 suggests controlled capitulation; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic-driven liquidation rather than orderly bottoming, invalidating the 'bottom' pattern match and signaling a continuation of the selloff

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A steepening inversion would signal recession acceleration and credit stress, contradicting the bottoming narrative; the August 2024 bottom coincided with curve stabilization, so renewed inversion proves the macro backdrop has deteriorated beyond the pattern's parameters

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
